assertions.text: The response fully refreshes the SimonK Stack by orchestrating the SimonK-stack git pull, wiki pull, /gstack-upgrade, the five vendored stack upgrades, and install.sh --force.
It produces a per-step summary with commits-pulled counts and a final state report.
The response updates the entire stack rather than a single component, equivalent to /stack-update.
It ends with a final state report summarizing each step's commits pulled.
The response recognizes this single-stack request should route to gstack-upgrade, not stack-update.
It does not orchestrate the full multi-stack refresh for this gstack-only request.
